title: Commit And Push Current Worktree
objective: Stage all current repository changes, create a single commit covering the current ATLAS workshop site and docs state, and push the current branch to origin.
instructions: Inspect the current worktree and include all current changes in the commit scope because the user explicitly asked to commit everything.
Create a clear commit message reflecting the homepage, docs, and control-tower state currently present in the repository.
Push the current branch to origin without rewriting history.
constraints: Do not force push or rewrite history.
Do not modify product code except Git-adjacent metadata if strictly necessary for the commit flow.
expected_outputs: A pushed commit on the current branch with commit SHA and a summary of what was included.
definition_of_done: All current changes are committed and the current branch is pushed to origin.
